programs.title: The Big Bang Theory

programs.desc: Ross is still trying to get used to the idea of Joey and Rachel being together. Chandler and Monica visit some friends of Phoebe's to learn about the adoption process.

programs.title: Friends
programs.desc: Monica and Phoebe's annoying friend visits, causing a rift between the women. Ross goes to a tanning salon but fails to follow the directions.

programs.title: Friends

programs.title: The Big Bang Theory
programs.desc: Amy records Sheldon talking in his sleep and tries to convince him that he has a more laid-back side. Meanwhile, Raj and Stuart compete to win the heart of Bernadette's new co-worker.
